instruction: The chart tile has an unwanted blue tint and thin lines. Restore the default outline treatment.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/chart-bar-square.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="0.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M7.5 14.25v2.25m3-4.5v4.5m3-6.75v6.75m3-9v9M6 20.25h12A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 20.25 18V6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 18 3.75H6A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3.75 6v12A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 6 20.25Z"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
